records.description: A child hood experiece  seems more real like an alien encounter then the "dream" I thought it was
Battle of LA: 1,400+ AA rounds fired at objects. Searchlights converged. Five civilians died.
6 doughnut-shaped objects over Puget Sound. One dropped molten slag onto boat. Army CIC investigated.
Pilot Kenneth Arnold: 9 crescent objects at 1,200mph. Coined 'flying saucer.' First modern UFO sighting.
Army announced 'flying disc' recovery, retracted to 'weather balloon.' Later attributed to Project Mogul.

PURSUE included the FBI Dallas field-office memo to HQ reporting that an Air Force major said 'an object purporting to be a flying disc was recovered near Roswell.' Memo: 'hexagonal in shape, suspended from a balloon ~20 ft in diameter.'
FBI Dallas memo to HQ: an Air Force major reported a recovered 'flying disc' near Roswell, 'hexagonal in shape, suspended from a balloon ~20 ft in diameter.' Later included in PURSUE.
Capt. Mantell crashed P-51 pursuing massive bright object. First pilot fatality linked to UFO.
The most-viewed FBI Vault file. Agent Guy Hottel relayed an informant claim of three 'flying saucers' recovered in New Mexico, each ~50 ft, with occupants. Never substantiated by the FBI.
Three Texas Tech professors saw V-formation of 20-30 bluish-green lights. Student photographed them. Blue Book: unexplained.
Objects on radar at National Airport + Andrews AFB. F-94s scrambled. Repeated Jul 26. Largest Pentagon press conf since WWII.
CIA-convened scientific panel that reviewed UFO data and recommended debunking sightings to reduce public interest. A foundational document in UFO secrecy history.
10,000+ spectators at football match watched cigar objects hover. Released silvery 'angel hair.' Match halted.
RAF/USAF radar tracked fast objects. Venom fighter got lock but object maneuvered behind and tailed it. Condon: 'most puzzling.'
15 callers: egg-shaped object on roads. 9+ vehicles had engines and lights killed, restored after departure. Most important EM case in US.
Betty and Barney Hill: disc with windows on Route 3. 'Missing time.' Car compass erratic near marks on vehicle afterward.
Officer Zamora saw egg-shaped craft + 2 small occupants. Burn marks, compressed soil, metal traces. Blue Book: 'unknown.'
Hitchhiker + two police officers saw pulsating red lights over fields. 60+ reports followed. Blue Book: 'unidentified.'
Fireball across 6 states. Acorn-shaped object recovered by military. Witnesses described hieroglyphic-like markings.
200+ students and staff saw grey saucer descend, land, ascend at extreme speed. Landing site grass flattened in circle.
Geologist Michalak touched a landed disc. Hot exhaust burned grid into his chest. Hospitalized. Canada $20 coin 2018.
RCMP officers saw lit object crash into harbour. Navy divers found nothing. Official Canadian govt 'UFO incident.'
Brilliant metallic, glowing disc shaped craft with red & blue lights in circle at bottom seen in Odessa, WA, 1969.
PURSUE files: Buzz Aldrin described unusual lights and objects during Apollo 11. Long-debated sighting now in official record. Skeptics attribute to panel reflections or detached debris.
PURSUE Release 2: reports of 'green fireballs' or 'green orbs' during the Apollo 12 mission, plus crew audio describing inflight light 'streaks.'
Approximately at 15:00 my friend spotted object in sky.  He said to me "hey there is one of those UFO's they talk about".  I thought he
PURSUE NASA file: Apollo 17 imagery shows three dots in triangular formation in lunar sky. Jack Schmitt: 'It's like the Fourth of July out there!' Analysts attribute to micrometeoroid impacts/debris.
Army helicopter pulled upward 1,800ft by cigar-shaped object without pilot input. 4 crew + ground witnesses.

This story is very familar with an experance me and about 8 of my friends saw about 30 years ago on Boston Street Salem Mass.

We sti
Security police saw luminous objects over weapons storage. Part of wave over US nuclear sites (Malmstrom, Loring, Wurtsmith).
I could see vehicles driving eastbound on the 134 freeway & the UFOs passing over the top of them.
F-4 Phantoms scrambled. Weapons systems jammed on approach. Confirmed by SECRET US DIA documents.
We thought our foster daughter was kidding us, until we saw the metallic saucer shaped object humming loudly over the Michigan farmland
Pilot Valentich radioed ATC describing unknown aircraft above him. Transmission cut off mid-sentence. Neither found.
USAF at RAF Woodbridge: glowing triangle over 3 nights. Lt. Col. Halt recorded elevated radiation + EM effects. 'Britain's Roswell.'
Cash-Landrum: diamond object belching flame, 23 military helicopters. All three witnesses suffered radiation burns. Cash died of cancer.
Brazilian AF scrambled F-5E and Mirage jets to intercept 20+ UFOs on radar across several states. Confirmed by AF Minister.
JAL 747 crew saw two small objects and one 'walnut-shaped' craft the size of a carrier. FAA radar confirmed. Division Chief preserved data.
Hundreds reported luminous craft with blue beam. Ed Walters photographed. Six AWOL Army intel analysts found in area.
~13,500 witnesses. Silent triangular craft. F-16s got radar lock; objects pulled 40g+ evasive maneuvers. Military press conference.
Belgian wave: Two F-16s scrambled. Radar: 280 to 1,800km/h acceleration and 1,500m dive in 1-2 seconds.
Luminous orbs near Greifswald nuclear power plant. Videotaped from multiple angles.
I and my brother were sitting on swings in a school playground, when a trianguler shaped object appeared.
62 children at Ariel School saw silver disc land. Described beings communicating telepathically. Harvard's Dr. John Mack investigated.
Three seemingly identical black, delta-shaped, ships with a very bright yellow or white "headlight."
Witnesses reported small beings captured by military and fire dept. Two entities taken to hospital. Military denied involvement.
V-formation from Henderson NV moving SE. Former police officer in Paulden confirmed. Prescott Valley: mile-wide silent craft.
Thousands saw V-formation spanning a mile. Second event ~10pm: orbs over Sierra Estrella. Governor confirmed personal sighting.
Southernmost Phoenix Lights reports. Object tracked ~300 miles from Nevada to Tucson in ~90 min.
A blue-green light moved so fast across the sky I had to turn my head to keep up with it.
Triangle tracked by police across multiple towns. Officers radioed each other in real-time. Sketch composites matched.
A silver disk with a bulge on one face, maybe 30 feet across, reflected sunlight and bobbed around at 3-5000 feet.
The craft came from the West out over the Pacific Ocean.  It was flying much higher than the Commercial Jet Traffic over Los Angeles.
Cmdr. Fravor: white 'Tic Tac' 40ft hovering above churning water. Accelerated beyond visual range in <1 sec. FLIR declassified 2020.
Triangular craft flies over highway... low altitude... then disappears only to reappear later
At party saw moving star become cigar UFO with 5 lights; hovered silently, changed colors, then sped off with 2 others in formation.
Bizarre, shiny, cylindrical object that moved intelligently for 15 minutes in broad daylight (St. Louis).
Big, silent V-shaped craft with about 8 circle shaped  very dark dimmed lights or windows fly over home.
United Airlines staff at Gate C17: dark metallic disc below clouds. Shot upward punching hole in overcast. FAA refused to investigate.
I was taking a break and laying on the sidewalk in front of our office looking straight up into the sky. The weather was clear, visibil
Dozens saw football-field-sized craft. F-16s in area. FAA radar confirmed anomalous returns.
Oval-shaped, metallic object w/ 2 bright lights pointing down spotted over Downtown LA; disappeared in 1 second.
Saucer shape, flying over Tempe, 6-7 white lights making a pattern as flew south. June 2, 2010 at apx, 9:10pm.
Triangle UFO witnessed in Kent, Washinton at about 1am on Wednesday morning, 8/11/10.
Row of vertical rectangular lights framed by darkness illuminated a circular matte gray object.
US Customs IR camera: object at 100+ mph split into two and entered ocean without slowing. DHS video leaked.
Observed a "V" shaped UFO with 15 whitish-yellow lights traverse 105 degrees of sky in 10 seconds, on a heading of 150.
Navy pilots: daily encounters 2014-15. GIMBAL and GOFAST IR videos. Objects with no propulsion against 120kt winds.

records.location: Lordsburg (E of, on I-10; 10 mi. W of AZ), NM
records.description: Large, unmarked, grey triangle shaped craft with bowl shaped hull underside as if to deflect heat upon re-entry under camo-net.
I live in Tempe, AZ, a city in the Phoenix metroplex area.  As you are probably aware, the Super Bowl was hosted here in Pho
Large, Green UFO saucer sighted flying over San Francisco Bay.  Size:  100 Yards across!  Very clear details.
Triangular aircraft with blue/pink lights arranged into a triangle at the base, blinking every second, quiet & hovering low in the sky.
NY Times revealed AATIP, the Pentagon's secret $22M UFO program run 2007-2012 by Luis Elizondo. Published FLIR1 video. Pivotal moment that broke the modern taboo.
Navy CIC filmed spheres swarming ship. One entered ocean without slowing. Pentagon confirmed video 2021.
PURSUE Release 2: formation-flying UAPs recorded over the Persian Gulf, Oct 2019. Multiple objects in coordinated flight. Contemporaneous with the USS Omaha swarm.
Pentagon officially released 3 Navy UAP videos (FLIR1, GIMBAL, GOFAST). First official US govt acknowledgment.
Pentagon officially released 3 Navy UAP videos (FLIR1, GIMBAL, GOFAST), confirming authenticity. First official US govt acknowledgment of unidentified craft on camera.
Department of the Air Force infrared video, 58 seconds, Middle East theater. Object tracked on IR sensor.
US military operator reported a UAP over the Persian Gulf. CENTCOM mission report.
US military operator reported a UAP over the Strait of Hormuz. One of three Hormuz-area reports in the release.
US military operator reported a UAP over Iran. CENTCOM IR sensor. Adds to the record of UAP over Iranian airspace dating to the 1976 Tehran F-4 case.
ODNI Preliminary Assessment on UAP: 144 reports (2004-2021), only 1 identified (balloon). 18 exhibited 'unusual movement patterns' including stationary hover in high winds.
DoD establishes All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) under Dr. Sean Kirkpatrick. Tasked to investigate UAP across air, sea, space. First permanent UAP office.
US military operator observed one UAP move north to south, total duration under one minute. Captured during active US operations in Syria.

PURSUE Release 3: FBI file on a 'potato'-shaped object, 'creamy/whitish opalescent,' 'somewhat translucent with a slight shimmer.' FBI produced an artistic interpretation from the witness description.
PURSUE Release 2 video: four UFOs in formation near Iranian boats, captured by US military IR. Officials did not publicly identify the objects.
CENTCOM IR sensor video shows an area of contrast moving bottom-left to top-right, leaving frame at ~6 sec. Operator reported a 'possible UAP' flying west to east; did not pursue.
US shot down Chinese balloon + 3 unidentified objects (Alaska, Yukon, Lake Huron). The 3 unknowns never identified.
US shot down Chinese surveillance balloon + 3 unidentified objects over N. America in 8 days (Alaska, Yukon, Lake Huron). The 3 unknowns never recovered or identified.
PURSUE Release 2: F-16 gun-camera footage of the Feb 2023 Lake Huron shootdown. One of 4 objects downed over N. America in 8 days. Octagonal object at ~20,000 ft, never recovered.
David Grusch, former NGA/UAP Task Force officer, went public alleging multi-decade crash retrieval and reverse-engineering programs. Filed complaint with IC IG, found 'credible and urgent.'
Grusch testified about crash retrieval programs. Fravor and Graves also testified. Bipartisan UAPDA legislation introduced.
Grusch, Fravor, Graves testified under oath. Grusch: non-human biologics recovered. Fravor: Tic Tac encounter. Graves: daily encounters off East Coast. Bipartisan UAPDA introduced.

NASA's independent study team published its UAP report, calling for better calibrated sensors and rigorous data, and finding no evidence of extraterrestrial origin while urging destigmatized scientific study.
CENTCOM IR sensor recorded a UAP over the United Arab Emirates. 43 seconds of infrared footage.
US military operator reported a UAP over Syria during active operations. CENTCOM mission report.
CENTCOM multi-sensor video of a 'diamond-shaped' UAP at ~434 knots, detectable only via short-wave infrared (SWIR). Split-screen EO/SWIR footage over the Mediterranean.
AARO Historical Record Report Vol 1: reviewed 1945-present, found 'no empirical evidence' of crash retrievals or reverse-engineering. Contradicted Grusch. Critics disputed methodology.
INDOPACOM infrared video tracking an area of contrast, 1:39. A Pacific-theater capture distinct from the Middle East cluster.
INDOPACOM 'football-shaped contrast' report, 9 seconds of footage. Short capture of an elliptical object on IR.
Pilot described a 'triangular and metallic UAP' flying at 25,000 ft over the Mediterranean. Among modern military incident reports in tranche 1.
AARO deployed GREMLIN, its prototype multi-sensor UAP detection system. Successfully collected data during March 2024 test. Planned for 90-day deployment at site of national security.
US military operator reported a UAP over the Gulf of Aden. CENTCOM mission report. Most recent CENTCOM report in PURSUE tranche 1.
ATC at LA Center reported UAP to NUFORC observed by military King Air crew on active frequency. Under investigation.
Elizondo, Gallaudet, Gold, Shellenberger testified. Elizondo confirmed reverse-engineering program exists. Gallaudet described personal 2015 Navy encounter. Elizondo called coverup a 'cabal.'
First NJ mystery drone sighting over Army research facility. Triggered wave of thousands of reports across NJ, NY, CT, PA. FAA restricted airspace. FBI investigated. Never fully explained.
AARO FY2024 report: 757 new cases, total 1,652. 21 cases deemed 'truly anomalous' requiring further investigation. 70% resolved as balloons. 444 lacked sufficient data.
Senate Armed Services subcommittee hearing led by Sen. Gillibrand on UAP, prompted by AARO FY24 report. Pentagon: no evidence of ET but 21 anomalous cases under review.
House whistleblower hearing. New witness Michael Borland described firsthand experiences and AARO classifying NHI-related info. Called for UAPDA 2025. Described DIA obstruction.

NARA released UAP records transferred from ODNI, OSD, FAA, and the Nuclear Regulatory Commission under the 2024 NDAA. Rolling additions to the UAP Collection. Set NARA_API_KEY to pull individual records.
Appears on ring camera at 11:20 defended a few times with some strange time lapse and then disappeared in an instant about hour later.
This is the second time i’ve seen this, it’s not a rocket or anything i’ve ever seen before it’s low and seems to just be light.
Looking SE at the night sky/constellations for approximately 30 minutes; before going inside, saw a UAP in the shape of the number 3
100's of lights if not more keep popping up in the north horizon going west to east disappearing in same spot
Nothing like I have ever seen. Fast and changing directions.   Jets chasing then Army helicopter.
I saw a black triangle shape craft flying high in the sky and went behind the clouds and never came back out.
Outside taking my dog out to use the bathroom looked up saw something pulsing thought it was a drone but then it shot off fast

Object was seen flying west to east towards me. Thought was plane at first but too fast, too bright. Emitted something out the front.
I was in my hot tub looking at the stars. Very quickly and appeared low a triangle with three dim lights zoomed by with no sound
We witnessed a glowing craft move from west to east in the sky. It had a strange cloudy glow around it that looked like a cloud

It was big, round with lights it would fly in the air and I also saw a spotlight come out from the bottom

While enjoying a night at the park I noticed two lights constantly fading in and out of the sky pacing back and forth for an hour.
Saw “star” object appear and disappear, pulled over to watch for 30min and there were multiple crafts.
Very low & slow moving craft heading easterly roughly 20 miles south of Lopez island. Eventually ducked behind the island. ~300 ft el.

Bluish white orb moving in short angular and circular directions, staying the same general area
Bright circular light flew through the sky in front of my husband and I. It was going fast! Was not a meteor as it turned on and off.
My 7yo spotted a bright “star” in daylight—reflective, silent, changed direction like it was guided. Not a drone. Nephi, UT @ 4:45PM.
I saw a strange object in the sky. It stopped for a few seconds in front of me, then moved at blink-of-an-eye speed without sound.
I saw 3 of these orbs within a few moments, all going different directions and turning. Saw planes too, these are not planes.
Grusch, Reps Luna/Burlison/Moskowitz/Burchett/Perry held press conference. Grusch alleged billions in annual 'slush funds,' DIA obstruction. Lawmakers demanded whistleblower immunity.
Large, hovering, silent, red and blue constant lights on opposing edges with bright white lights.
Was waiting for the moon to rise up and then out of nowhere this huge roundish super bright light was hovering for about 5 mins
8 crafts spotted cruising in sky across coast, no sound or flashes, entered clouds and disappeared, final 2 crafts were 200 ft apart.
Seen light in sky got brighter and faded then 2 more orbs appeared in triangle formation started recording as they disappeared
I saw a dull black huge disc shaped with another layer of craft under that, but connected. Spires high up from the top & bottom.
Observed 2 objects, then 5. Captured 3 objects that were stationary for approximately 5 minutes on cell phone.
I was outside walking my dog and seen a circle object in the sky and there was no sounds of regular aircraft
Blue orb moving 5 degrees side to side, then changing color to green, then shooting down out of sight
After noticing black object in sky. Object did not move or fly away. It stayed in one spot until it got dark. It had no lights.
Driving northbound saw bright unmoving light high in the sky and had grandaughter record it til it was lost behind trees
A small white-silver object, too small to identify the shape, traveling super-fast to the East. I observed it for about 10 seconds
The two spheres remained equal distance apart and not moving, though the storm cloud were moving fast by them. Then they went straighth

We saw an extremely bright blue orb blinking moving incredibly fast and about 40 ft off the ground

Similar to a star, solid blue in color, going parallel and perpendicular, crisscrossing, stopping, then moving again.
Object was at 10:30 to 11:00-high azimuth and, it was moving along it's length from West-NorthWest to East-SouthEast in relation to me.
The sphere flew in a controlled manner, over the house, east to west, over the tuscawares river, and over a tree line of a crop field

Black triangle craft about 300 feet above my house for about a minute and a half to two minutes.
Small white light moving light at ground level. Large orange sphere appeared in sky above light elevated approximately 100 ft
Was travelling south on I5 between Marysville and Everett when I spotted the UAP which was fixed in the sky not moving.
Over horizon facing east we seen orbs flying around also later triangle crafts over head

Driving on freeway, spotted a disk over the water. Passed under a bridge and disk vanished

I can not give you exact number of the orbs that were seen but there were many of them
I looked up at the sky and saw this white ball dropping towards the ground but when I zoomed in it appeared to be changing colors.
Saw glowing object zigzag across western sky, hovered, then vanished at incredible speed.
Saw a traveling bubble in backyard, that avoided tree branches and fences. It looks exactly like the bubble crafts seen in Denmark 1970
Bright orange orb, car-sized, floated silently at eye level past my 3rd-floor balcony in Gainesville, GA around 1 AM—no sound or impact
Watching the stars with my little boy both nights and these were bright and one of them even stops for a second in 1 of my videos
Came down through the tree line bright green fireball. Going towards Addison from Middlebury
PURSUE Release 3: 'Northeastern Orb Sighting' video shows two bright lights moving in tandem. FBI: witnesses described silent, smooth motion 'as though tethered together.' Captured on iPhone.
Right above 50' in the air no intense sound and triangular military style but with small plane tail aircraft like structures
Ring/Disc of white lights which remained stationary about 200ft above the tree line on the mountain.
Rapid movement, side to side, up and down. Then stopped for 1 minute and seem to land behind apartments.
I was in the yard looking up at the stars thinking "man I really wish I could see a UFO"

I have two photos, one minute apart of a multi-colored lighted object close to the moon.

Overnight trucker saw silent, erratic triangular craft with 2 white lights & 1 flashing red, floating before vanishing.
It was moving fast then slow. Up and then down. Way to the left circle around. Then stop and hover. Then went way to the right way over

Green light appeared in sky, was motionless, then rapidly moved west, and disappeared.
Very bright orb that looked like a giant light flying atleast 500ft high at a very fast manner. Got extremely bright and disappeared

These 2 ufos were just hovering low in the sky. They appeared closer to a Windmill farm, but seem to hover higher in the sky.
Silver reflective solid orb: stationary for a while then moved into a cloud and disappeared.
Lights flew W→E, then turned N & vanished, repeating w/ sparkles. Paused for planes, faster than aircraft, not blinking or Starlink.

Tennis ball sized egg.  Thought it was a firework and heard a weird noise and drove away quickly and fear

Saw a very fast moving object in the sky. It wasn’t a plane or helicopter. It was way too fast
The fireball like object dropped from the sky at an angle, as it near the nearby forest it slowed down, hovered and vanished.
Sighted object that appeared to follow coastline north of Ventura at approximately 1,000 ft. elevation.
Multiple objects, some emitting from stationary “stars”, From, at least three different directions, heading in the same direction.
An orb star like drone being followed and chased by red lighted object pulsating it's lights headed from Winchester toward Chesterfield
Vertical white tic tac hovering at very high altitude northeast of Roswell. Remained in sight for 45 mins.
Noticed a bright light in the sky an hour before sunset. My wife and neighbors saw it too. Stationary for 1 hr+.
Lights changing luminosity and direction above the horizon in ways not normally capable by aircraft
It moved up and down and side to side unlike any aircraft I’ve ever seen. The brightest light. Looked like a dandelion shaped star.
Black triangle shaped craft at about 30,000 ft with white lights around the edges. Hovered for awhile then shot straight up
I saw what appeared to be a large metal object hovering in the sky, near to the ground, just above the trees
Two objects above the water. One had 3 bright yellow lights, and another one had one bright yellow light they show up above the water.

This has been going on for several weeks - appear at different elevations from the ground.

3 crafts, first a large somewhat triangular silent craft with bright white lights flying very low behind trees horizontal then 2 lights
I saw 3 orbs the in the middle was bright and the 2 on either side were blinking. They then merged into the middle, then separated.
Every night in Crossville, TN between 3–4 a.m., silent glowing orbs appear, move freely, form shapes, then vanish without a trace.
Moving right to left- extreamly high speed. I assumed it was a meteor but realized it was too low

Star like object brightly visible over the setting sun that disappeared before our eyes.

Spinning lights changing color, 40 foot long flying saucer, no sound for being close by

This Craft Had Three faint lights on each point of the isosceles triangle and it was moving parallel to the horizon From NE to SE
Triangle type craft traveling completely silent, not shown on local radar. Continuous speed and line of travel.
Looking at a ridge from my deck and light would appear and move in a direction and then brighten and disappear, next time move otherway
Second week in a row, multiple orbs on various days near 9pm-10pm, rapid movement, no FAA compliant lights, disappearing / reappearing
Blue orb with a red tail moving laterally across the sky about 30ft above me, moving slowly at first then sped up and shot upwards
Object was stationary to the SE of my home; flashed in intervals like aircraft strobe lights, but did not perceptibly move.
Five UFOs roaming through the skies for 10 to 15 minutes before becoming stationary for another 15 minutes.
Object was reflecting the sunset very brightly and stayed in fixed point in the sky. Grew dim when sun set. Gone when I checked later.
A weird rectangle with swirly things around it, likely stars surrounding it and it kinda didn’t move and Was the direct opposite moon
Moving and glowing extremely bright white and silver light moving west to east over Manchester New Hampshire. Took a sharp 90 degree

A bright light appeared in the sky. Very bright. Then a beam of light emitted from the object scanned me and a friend.

Looking north when I saw four circular red glowing orbs more than one and then back-and-forth
Me and my neighbor seen a ufo and the biggest brightest beam of light we have ever seen.
An almond shape with two hooks pointing forward.  It was there for a second and zapped out of view.
